title: Armored Vanguard
description: A simple resource pack that makes some armor look like knight armor, axes look like battle axes and more items look medival themed items. Now with Friends&Foes compatability
body: ![Armored Vanguard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/194119e14e58baeb64531a2fe9ed31e8271019a8.png) ## Welcome to Armored Vanguard, A _medival stiled_ resource pack that sure will make minecraft look more like a medival game. ### This resaurce pack features: - **Custom armor:** > - Leather hat ![leather hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d80757d7e4e2e5f67301daddc0cff13a55d60b_0.webp) > - Archer armor ![Archer hood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df10f21fedaa1f7f377c448dc6defe3a5459f571.png) > - Iron, Golden, Diamond, Netherite knight armor ![Iron helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08ec60a62c6947d3e9e994e0abbc813ee3bfa14c_0.webp) > - Golden Crown (and crown fragment) ![Golden crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf6893c0a38fc6f420b76f8e2c8f0d8e25435a54_0.webp) _Helmet items also are custom_ - **Custom items:** > - All tiers of swords ![Iron sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd9d741f38401d6b68b4490edacc63012878b7cc_0.webp) > - All tiers of battle axes ![Iron battle axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e6c49bc00d600eebd29dc4be11dbf33cfc703f9_0.webp) > - Trident to Pitchfork ![Pitchfork](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09169ea5e906b2dc05e7365ffb70e87d7975407e_0.webp) > - Mace to hammer ![Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6970769f0fb7f1c3e6779d6449dc1d051f637ba0.png) > - Totem of Undying to "The ceremonial mace" ![Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dbdb004b5793f17005934d197e8f62060159edc_0.webp) - **Other stuff:** > - Swords are bigger cuz in my oppinion swords are too small in minecraft _All subtitels say the the custom name, e.g. original: "mace smashes", with rp: "hammer smashes"_ **Really big thank you for 1k downloads. Didn't think we would hit it this early. And as a 1k special, I opened a discord server just for my resource packs.** ## Other projects: ### Recomendation: I really recomend you to use _I see my armored hand_ mod so you see your armor in first person Shout out @RazorPlay01 ![Armor with mod and rp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/409d8f6ec5e39979eeefac763508a6a15dc997c4.png)
